title: Swachhata Pakhwada 2026 being organised in Department of Justice with great enthusiasm and active participation of officers and staff
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Law and Justice

Swachhata Pakhwada 2026 being organised in Department of Justice with great enthusiasm and active participation of officers and staff

Posted On:
07 APR 2026 5:55PM by PIB Delhi

The Department of Justice is observing Swachhata Pakhwada 2026 from 1
st
 April to 15
th
 April 2026 wherein a number of activities have been proposed to be undertaken towards cleanliness, hygiene and awareness amongst officers and staff.

The Pakhwada commenced with the a
dministration of Swacchata Pledge to the officers/staff of the Department on 1
st
 April 2026. Shri Niraj Verma, Secretary (Justice) administered the pledge to all and reinforced the commitment towards Clean India.

The event followed by the Voluntary Shramdaan at Jaisalmer House premises wherein officers and staff actively participated in the drive and extended their support/ commitment towards Swachh Bharat Abhiyan.

The event marked with enthusiastic participation from officers and staff, reinforcing the spirit of collective responsibility towards maintaining cleanliness in workplaces and beyond.

A series of other events have been proposed during the celebration of the Pakhwada in the Department of Justice, which included a
Session on Yoga, Workshop on Swachhata, Essay writing & Drawing competition on Swachhata and Segregation of obsolete items and their auction.

***

Samrat/PN

(Release ID: 2249785)

Visitor Counter : 71
